name: Feral! Future Leonardo
description:
I said I would make this, and I did. Andd.. then forgot about it. But basically this is once again for people who really want to fuck this guy for some reason, but there will be NO test chat like I usually put because the one I did is a tad bit too extreme and graphic to be comfortable to read if you didn't do it yourself, so sorry! Maybe I'll do another chat soon if I can, who knows?

EDIT: If you happened to read that chat that I forgot I put public before I posted this bot.. I sincerely apologize, and I hope you will be able to heal thoroughly and get through it. If you didn't read it.. good. Trust me, it's better this way.
creator: SpecialAirs
